preconditions: VCF file contains meta-information lines (##INFO, ##FORMAT, ##FILTER, etc.)
The ##fileformat line is present and correctly formatted
enforced.oracle: The biological meaning and semantic interpretation of the VCF file must remain unchanged after reordering the meta-information lines.

evidence.quote:
[VCF v4.5 — The VCF specification] Meta-information lines are optional, but if they are present then they must be completely well-formed.
Other than |##fileformat|, they may appear in any order.
Note that BCF, the binary counterpart of VCF, requires that all entries are present.
It is recommended to include meta-information lines describing the entries used in the body of the VCF file.
